rows.label: tev000795_MSG0001
rows.name: Is that you, [ST:playername ]?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0002
rows.name:
We were just discussing what to do with
all the stuff that Lao left behind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0003
rows.name: His rifle... His protective gear...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0004
rows.name: Shirts... Jacket... Bed... Blankets...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0005
rows.name:
A bottle of expensive liquor and
a framed photo of his family...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0006
rows.name:
Saiden and Shingo might get their
old bodies back and come home one
day, so their stuff is fine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0007
rows.name: But Lao...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0008
rows.name:
Anyway, what do you think
we should do with it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_JNK0010
rows.name: Dispose

rows.label: tev000795_SEL0011
rows.name: Suggest it be thrown away.

rows.label: tev000795_JNK0020
rows.name: Keep

rows.label: tev000795_SEL0021
rows.name: Suggest that Doug leave everything alone.

rows.label: tev000795_JNK0030
rows.name: Plunder

rows.label: tev000795_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Doug if you can have the booze.

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0009
rows.name: Oof. That's some harsh judgment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0010
rows.name:
The director general
said the same thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0011
rows.name:
He thought there was a possible danger
from Growth items that might be mixed
in with his personal effects.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0012
rows.name:
And he also wanted to clear the
room for a new BLADE recruit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0013
rows.name:
But just tossing all this
stuff seems so...sad.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0014
rows.name:
I think I'm going to have
it stored somewhere.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0015
rows.name:
That was actually Vandham's suggestion,
so it should be good enough for now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0016
rows.name:
Still, I think I may just
hold on to this picture.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0017
rows.name: Yeah, I know what you mean.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0018
rows.name: I wish we could do that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0019
rows.name:
I know that if he ever was able to
come home, he'd really appreciate
all his stuff still being here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0020
rows.name:
But the BLADE Home are
crowded enough as it is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0021
rows.name:
And we need to clear out his room
so that another BLADE can use it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0022
rows.name:
We can't afford to turn the room of
every fallen BLADE into a shrine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0023
rows.name:
I wonder if it'd be okay if I took all
his stuff and had it stored somewhere...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0024
rows.name:
At the very least, I'll hang
on to that photo for him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0025
rows.name: Are you serious?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0026
rows.name:
Come on. This is no time
to be joking around.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0027
rows.name:
I was planning to take
that booze for myself![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0028
rows.name: Heh heh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0029
rows.name:
...Seriously, would you
mind if I took it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0030
rows.name:
The rest of this stuff will
probably all be seized and
disposed of one way or the other.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0031
rows.name:
But I could hold on to the bottle for him,
and then if he ever did come back...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0032
rows.name:
I dunno. Maybe me and him
could drink it together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0033
rows.name:
I should probably hang
on to that photo, too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0034
rows.name: Look how happy his family looks...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0035
rows.name:
We all left our families behind
when we boarded the White Whale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0036
rows.name:
And don't take this the wrong way, but we can't allow
ourselves to forget that we bear a great responsibility
to those we sacrificed in order to reach this planet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0037
rows.name:
I'm going to work hard to honor Lao
and his family. And I'll do it by
fighting to survive here on Mira![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0038
rows.name: I hope you'll help me in this endeavor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0039
rows.name:
Speaking of which, I think you should
take his weapon and armor. That's
better than letting them go to waste.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000795_MSG0040
rows.name:
Don't worry. If just a couple of
things go missing, I'll get chewed
out and that'll be the end of it.[ST:wait ]
